economic_notes: Deninu K'ue Holdings Limited is a subsidiary that was not consolidated due to incomplete financial records at time of audit. Impact Benefit Agreement fund receives contributions related to resource development agreements.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - subsidiary Deninu K'ue Holdings Limited was not consolidated due to incomplete financial records. Financial statements are non-consolidated. The fiscal year is 2023 not 2024 - auditor signed March 20, 2025 but statements are for year ended March 31, 2023. Total revenue calculated as General Fund revenue (5,335,423) plus IBA Fund revenue (330,338) = 5,665,761. Total expenses calculated as General Fund expenditure (4,998,421) plus IBA Fund expenditure (393,039) = 5,391,460. Annual surplus = 337,002 (General) + (-62,701) (IBA) = 274,301. OSR calculated as total revenue minus government transfers (Canada 1,674,269 + NWT 1,223,682 + Akaitcho 80,000 = 2,977,951); OSR = 5,665,761 - 2,977,951 = 2,687,810. No schedule of remuneration included in the provided text.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
